text:
Market today: Sentiment is mixed, but the scaling back of Fed rate hike bets and positive AI news from Tencent and Nvidia are key drivers for your tech/chip heavy portfolio. Global central bank signals are also in play.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -28.7% on a leveraged product, amplified by margin. SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is also down -9.58% as a new position. QQQI needs trimming per your scanner.

Watch: Keep a close eye on interest rate expectations as Fed rate hike bets scale back, which can directly impact tech valuations. Also, monitor the SMH scanner setup for a potential add if it pulls back to entry.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your leveraged positions while staying alert for tech sector opportunities.
plays: Cut losses on SOXL. Its -28.7% loss on a 3x leveraged ETF is a major risk, especially on margin.
Trim SPAL. It's a new, leveraged position already down 9.58%; reduce exposure to this decay.
Trim QQQI as indicated. This reduces overall exposure slightly without a deep loss.
